summary: Comprehensive testing of Vendor Commission Calculation feature. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verification confirms all commission features working correctly in both Vendor Portal and Admin Vendors page.
passed_tests: Backend: Vendors have deposit_commission and withdrawal_commission rates
Backend: /api/vendor/me returns commission rates for vendor
Backend: Deposit approval calculates commission based on deposit_commission rate
Backend: Withdrawal approval calculates commission based on withdrawal_commission rate
Backend: vendor_commission_amount and vendor_commission_rate stored on transaction
Backend: /api/vendor/me returns settlement_by_currency with commission_earned
Backend: /api/vendors/{id} returns settlement_by_currency with commission_earned
Backend: Vendor transactions include vendor_commission_amount for approved transactions
Backend: Admin vendor transactions include commission data
Backend: Total commission is sum of commission_earned from all currencies
Backend: Different vendor rates (vendor3) correctly applied to commission calculation
Frontend: Vendor Portal Settlement Balance card shows formula (Deposits - Withdrawals - Commission)
Frontend: Vendor Portal shows Commission earned breakdown (e.g., $40 USD)
Frontend: Vendor Portal shows Total Commission Earned card ($40 with rates: 1.5% / 2%)
Frontend: Vendor Portal transactions table has Commission column
Frontend: Vendor Portal Commission column shows values like $10, $15 for approved transactions
Frontend: Admin Vendors page shows Settlement Balance by Currency (Deposits - Withdrawals - Commission)
Frontend: Admin Vendors page shows Commission earned in settlement breakdown
Frontend: Admin Vendors page shows Total Commission Earned: $40
Frontend: Admin Vendors page shows Net Settlement (USD): $1,460 (correct formula applied)
Frontend: Admin Vendors transactions table has Commission column with $10, $15 values
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created during backend tests for commission verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Commission Calculation feature fully tested and working. Key features verified: 1) Commission calculated on vendor_approve_transaction endpoint using deposit_commission or withdrawal_commission rate. 2) Commission stored as vendor_commission_amount and vendor_commission_rate on approved transactions. 3) Settlement formula (Deposits - Withdrawals - Commission) correctly implemented in aggregation pipeline. 4) Frontend displays: Settlement Balance card with formula, Total Commission Earned card, Commission column in transactions table, commission_earned breakdown in settlement details. 5) Currency exchange rates are MOCKED in backend/server.py EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD dict.

vendor_commission_calculation.deposit_commission: Applied on deposit approval based on vendor's deposit_commission rate
vendor_commission_calculation.withdrawal_commission: Applied on withdrawal approval based on vendor's withdrawal_commission rate
vendor_commission_calculation.storage: vendor_commission_amount and vendor_commission_rate stored on transaction

vendor_portal_ui.commission_earned_breakdown: Shows: Commission earned: $X USD under settlement details
vendor_portal_ui.total_commission_card: Shows: Total Commission Earned with dollar amount and rate info
vendor_portal_ui.commission_column: Transactions table has Commission header with $X values for approved txs

admin_vendors_ui.settlement_balance_section: Shows: Settlement Balance by Currency (Deposits - Withdrawals - Commission)
admin_vendors_ui.net_settlement: Shows: Net Settlement (USD): calculated with commission deducted
admin_vendors_ui.commission_column: Transactions table shows Commission column with values

mocked_api.currency_exchange_rates: EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD in backend/server.py - hardcoded rates for USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, INR, JPY, USDT
